_comment: A reusable pattern derived from the JDBC pool saturation incident described in methodology § 6.2. POST this body to /api/v1/patterns. After creation, GET /api/v1/patterns/:id/candidates returns Spring Boot components that don't yet have a check_cmd; POST /api/v1/patterns/:id/propagate applies the templates to selected components in one shot.
name: Spring Boot — JDBC pool health
description: Detects JDBC pool saturation (the most frequent silent failure mode in Spring Boot apps backed by Postgres / MySQL). Generated from incident INC-2026-04-118 on billing-api after the team agreed the bare /actuator/health check was masking pool exhaustion.
